mapper.select: SELECT BOOK_ID, TITLE, AUTHOR, PUBLISHER, PRICE, PAGE_COUNT, DESCRIPTION, REG_DATE FROM BOOK WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
SELECT BOOK_ID, TITLE, AUTHOR, PUBLISHER, PRICE, PAGE_COUNT, DESCRIPTION, REG_DATE FROM BOOK WHERE BOOK_ID = #{bookId} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOOK (BOOK_ID, TITLE, AUTHOR, PUBLISHER, PRICE, PAGE_COUNT, DESCRIPTION, REG_DATE, DELETE_YN) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{price}, #{pageCount}, #{description}, NOW(), 'N')
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOK SET TITLE = #{title}, AUTHOR = #{author}, PUBLISHER = #{publisher}, PRICE = #{price}, PAGE_COUNT = #{pageCount}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, UPD_DATE = NOW() WHERE BOOK_ID = #{bookId} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.delete: UPDATE BOOK SET DELETE_YN = 'Y', UPD_DATE = NOW() WHERE BOOK_ID = #{bookId} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
